LexerType.name: cpp
LexerType.WordsStyle: alignas alignof noexcept nullptr static_assert thread_local final override

LexerType.name: xml
LexerType.ext: xaml svg xul vcxproj csproj vbproj fsproj lsxtproj shproj xproj ccproj jsproj sqlproj dbproj msbuildproj props

WordsStyle.name: END OF LINE WHERE STRING IS NOT CLOSED
DIVSION OF LEADING WHITESPACE IN LINE
END OF LINE WHERE STRING IS NOT CLOSED
LANGUAGE NATIVE KEYWORD OR RESERVED WORD
LABEL TO JUMP TO WITH THE GOTO STATEMENT
